scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env production --outdir dist --minify
scripts.build:preview: mkdir -p dist && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env preview --outdir dist --minify
scripts.build:production: mkdir -p dist && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env production --outdir dist --minify
scripts.db:migrate:preview: wrangler d1 migrations apply ss-preview --env preview
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply ss-prod --env production
